General.Name: Going Public Media Aktiengesellschaft
General.Description: Going Public Media Aktiengesellschaft engages in media business in Germany. The company operates cross-media platforms, including GoingPublic, that focuses on capital market; HV Magazine, that provides reports on experience and practice; Life Sciences, that offers newsletter about life sciences and technology content; FuS, a journal for family businesses; and Unternehmeredition, that provides medium-sized businesses topic. It also publishes magazines; operates web platforms, newsletters, and social media channels; and provides event activities and network services. The company was incorporated in 1998 and is based in Munich, Germany.
